Forsikring for alt du er glad i – Tryg Forsikring

https://www.tryg.no/
Avvik: 118 | Bestått: 201
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="main-menu__heading">Hva leter du etter?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="sr-only">Link-liste</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden" id="block-tabsmenu-menu">Tabs menu</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="headline">Fakturaoversikt på Min side</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Tilgjengelighetserklæring | Tryg Forsikring

https://www.tryg.no/om-tryg/tilgjengelighetserklaering.html
Avvik: 110 | Bestått: 157
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="main-menu__heading">Hva leter du etter?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="sr-only">Link-liste</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

2.1.1 Tastatur (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div class="account-nav__overlay-transparent" onclick="toggleAccountNav()"> </div>
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div class="account-nav__overlay" onclick="toggleAccountNav()"> </div>
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div class="login-box__overlay-menu" onclick="closeLogin()"> </div>
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div class="login-box__overlay-content u-container-fluid u-fade-in" onclick="closeLogin()"> <div aria-labelledby="login" aria-modal="true" class="login-box__open" onclick="event.stopPropagation()" rol
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div aria-labelledby="login" aria-modal="true" class="login-box__open" onclick="event.stopPropagation()" role="dialog"> <div class="login-box__close u-flex-end"><button aria-label="Logg inn knapp, utv
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input aria-hidden="true" class="t-toggler" id="t-menu-toggler" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input aria-hidden="true" class="t-toggler" id="t-search-toggler" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-controls="search-panel" aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="true" aria-label="Søkefelt minimert, dobbelklikk for å utvide" class="t-header-btn t-menu-btn__search-toggler t-btn-std-focus"

4.1.1 Parsing (3 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'desk-search-wrapper' appears 2 times

id="desk-search-wrapper"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'searchinput' appears 2 times

id="searchinput"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'overlay_close_btn' appears 2 times

id="overlay_close_btn"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (59 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='img' needs an accessible name

<div class="svg t-main-navbar__logo__graphic tryg-logo" focusable="false" role="img"> </div>
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-hidden="true" class="modal fade para_infopopup infopopup" id="para_infopopup1" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"> <div class="modal-dialog modal-dialog-chat-card"> <div class="modal-content"> <div
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='article' needs an accessible name

<article about="/om-tryg/tilgjengelighetserklaering.html" class="webform full clearfix" data-history-node-id="1515" role="article"> <div class="content"> <div class="field field--name-field-banner fie
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

Sikkerhet og personvern | Tryg Forsikring

https://www.tryg.no/sikkerhet-og-personvern/index.html
Avvik: 112 | Bestått: 154
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="main-menu__heading">Hva leter du etter?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="sr-only">Link-liste</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="privat-user-menu navbar navbar-default navbar-we-mega-menu mobile-collapse click-action" data-action="clicked" data-alwayshowsubmenu="1" data-animation="None" data-autoarrow="" data-block-
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (34 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til Min Side'

<a aria-label="" class="we-mega-menu-li" href="https://minside.tryg.no/" target="" title=""> Gå til Min Side </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til Min Side'

<a class="link cstm_lnk_1" href="https://minside.tryg.no"><div class="item">Gå til Min Side</div></a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

Duplicate ID found: 'desk-search-wrapper' appears 2 times

id="desk-search-wrapper"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'searchinput' appears 2 times

id="searchinput"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'overlay_close_btn' appears 2 times

id="overlay_close_btn"
Each ID must be unique on the page

First heading is h2, should start with h1

Start your heading structure with h1

MODERATE

<h4 class="sr-only">Link-liste</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

Få inntil 20 % rabatt på forsikringene dine | Tryg Forsikring

https://www.tryg.no/forsikringer/fordeler-hos-tryg/samlerabatt-og-fordeler.html
Avvik: 114 | Bestått: 177
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="main-menu__heading">Hva leter du etter?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="sr-only">Link-liste</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/tryg-insurance" target="_blank"><img alt="Linkedin" class="footer-bottom__icon" src="/sites/default/files/images/icons/some_linkedin.svg"/> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.1.1 Tastatur (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div class="account-nav__overlay-transparent" onclick="toggleAccountNav()"> </div>
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link

Each ID must be unique on the page

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="t-header-btn__icon"> <use xlink:href="#tryg-icon-x" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"></use> </svg>
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="dr_minside_common_Logo_trygLogo_link tryg-logo-link" href="#" id="tryg-logo" style="display: block;" target="_self"> <div class="u-hide-on-mobile"> <span class="sr-only dr_minside_common_Lab
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="dr_minside_chatbot_text_readmore" href="https://www.tryg.no/sikkerhet-og-personvern/personvern.html"></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="miachatprivate openMiachatPrivate t-chat_wrapper-link" data-dismiss="modal" onclick=""> <button class="btn t-btn-black--positive chat-box-overlay-btn chat-open-btn dr_minside_chatbot_text_fo
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="miachatprivateclaims openMiachatClaims t-chat_wrapper-link" data-dismiss="modal" onclick=""> <button class="btn t-btn-black--positive chat-box-overlay-btn chat-open-btn dr_minside_chatbot_te
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-hidden="true" class="close dispNone t-color-white" data-dismiss="modal" id="close-chat-overlay-header" tabindex="-1">Lukk</button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

About Tryg Forsikring | Tryg Forsikring

https://www.tryg.no/om-tryg/english/index.html
Avvik: 109 | Bestått: 169
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="main-menu__heading">Hva leter du etter?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="sr-only">Link-liste</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

Use only one <main> element per page

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/tryg-insurance" target="_blank"><img alt="Linkedin" class="footer-bottom__icon" src="/sites/default/files/images/icons/some_linkedin.svg"/> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.1.1 Tastatur (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div class="account-nav__overlay-transparent" onclick="toggleAccountNav()"> </div>
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link

CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

Forsikring for alt du er glad i – Tryg Forsikring

https://www.tryg.no/
Avvik: 118 | Bestått: 201
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="main-menu__heading">Hva leter du etter?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="sr-only">Link-liste</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link

https://www.tryg.no/kundeservice
Avvik: 10 | Bestått: 115
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden" id="block-tabsmenu-menu">Tabs menu</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til Min Side'

<a href="https://minside.tryg.no">Gå til Min Side</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til kundeservice for bedrift.'

<a href="https://www.tryg.no/bedrift/kontakt/index.html">Gå til kundeservice for bedrift.</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til tilbudsskjema'

<a class="button button-tertiary-wrapper" href="https://www.tryg.no/kundeservice/fa-tilbud-pa-forsikringer" target="_self"> <span>Gå til tilbudsskjema</span> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til bedrift'

<a href="https://www.tryg.no/bedrift/index.html">Gå til bedrift</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.finansportalen.no/" target="_blank">Sammenlign våre priser med andre selskaper på finansportalen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://tryg.no --max-pages 19 --format html
